pkgmetadata.longdescription:
Command-line helper that broadcasts the local desktop as an NDI source on the LAN. Opens an xdg-desktop-portal ScreenCast session (the system popup picks a monitor or window), wraps the resulting PipeWire stream with gst-launch-1.0, and publishes it via ndisink under a name like "Display" or "Window". Receivers on the LAN (Ecamm Live, OBS, NDI Tools) pick it up automatically.
Designed for the zentoo Wayland substrate on Apple Silicon Asahi Linux. The pipeline forces SHM negotiation (sidestepping Apple-tiled DMA-BUF) and letterboxes to 1080p so receivers without per-source fit/fill see the full desktop. The companion noctalia plugin provides a bar tile that toggles streaming.
